text: The [system name] system shall display a stable environment, automated decisions, and streamlined workflows using industry standard coding and documentation practices.
The [system name] system shall maintain security and confidentiality requirements as dictated by HIPAA and FDA regulatory standards.
The [system name] system shall display hyperlinks and descriptions for the user to perform functions as specified in the related UIS.
The user shall be able to view the hyperlinks and descriptions listed.
The user shall be able to choose a function by clicking the hyperlink.
The [system name] system shall display the desired operational page after the user clicks a hyperlink.
A user with admin privileges shall be able to Add/Create a new user and associate the user with specified roles.
The [system name] system shall display an error message if the new user already exists in the system.
The [system name] system shall display an error message if the new user is not active in the Active Directory.
The [system name] system shall display the xxx tab as the default tab.
The user shall be able to create or add a new user manually or from a template.
The user record shall inherit all specified role settings in the template when created from a user template.
The user shall be able to add additional roles manually while creating a new user from a template.
The [system name] system shall save user info to the database with specified roles associated with divisions.
The [system name] system shall perform a search on display name and user name columns to verify user existence.
The [system name] system shall perform a search in Active Directory to verify user status when creating a new user.
The [system name] system shall generate a standard confirmation message after saving data.
The [system name] system shall generate warning or caution messages after the cancel or close button is clicked.
The [system name] system shall mark all required fields with a red asterisk.
The user shall be able to save data after creating a new user or cancel to abort the process.
The [system name] system shall clear data if the user clicks the Cancel button during user creation.
The [system name] system shall direct the user to the xxx Page if the close button is clicked without data entry.
The user must associate at least one role, division, designator code, and lab location when creating a new user.
The user must fill in the User Name and Display Name fields in the User Information section.
The [system name] system shall generate an error/warning message if the user attempts to save without required associations or fields.
The Project Team must demonstrate mockups of UI changes to stakeholders early in the development process.
The Project Team shall schedule updates to the production environment only on Tuesdays between 7pm and 7am.
The Project Team must perform appropriate testing against new functionality prior to production release.
The Development Team shall define and consistently follow coding standards for the application.
The [system name] system shall log errors, warnings, and informational messages to an external log file.
The [system name] system shall log an error message to the external data file when directing users to the error page.
The [system name] system shall send a notification email to Client Services if a user is directed to the xxx error page.
The Development Team shall develop functionalities using the supported .NET 3.5 Platform.
The [system name] system shall continue to use a single SQL Server 2008 database.
The Technical Owner shall provide signoff before any build is deployed to production.
The Technical Lead shall perform code reviews of every system change before commitment to source control.
The QA/QC Team must perform regression testing against all scheduled builds.
The [system name] system shall display a hypertext link labeled Help at the top right corner of each user screen.
The [system name] system shall provide a pop-up window displaying page information and help links upon selecting Help.
The [system name] system shall display the Overview page as the default help topic upon selecting the Help link.
The [system name] system must allow users to navigate help topics via a left-frame hypertext link.
The [system name] system shall display the [company name] logo in the top right side of each help page.
The [system name] system must exhibit help pages using a specified color scheme and background.
The [system name] system shall provide searching ability for users to find specific topic material in the help tool.
The [system name] system shall provide an index for in-depth search of topic contents in the help tool.
The [system name] system shall provide a Glossary for industry-related terms through the online help tool.
The [system name] system shall retain existing HIPAA compliance capabilities.
